pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 with JUnit 5 (Jupiter) and add Mockito for modern testing support.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to version 3.0.0-M4 to support JUnit 5 and Java 17.
Upgrade maven-failsafe-plugin to version 3.0.0-M4 to support JUnit 5 and Java 17.
Upgrade maven-javadoc-plugin to version 3.3.1 to ensure compatibility with Java 17 documentation generation.
Upgrade maven-shade-plugin to a snapshot version to fix compatibility issues with Java 16+ module system.
Add Hibernate Core and EclipseLink dependencies for JPA implementation.
Add JDBC drivers for H2, PostgreSQL, and MySQL.
Add JSON Web Token (JWT) dependencies for authentication.
Upgrade Lombok to a newer version compatible with recent Java versions.
Add Jacoco Maven plugin for code coverage analysis.
Add SonarQube scanner and quality gate plugins.
Add versions-maven-plugin to check for dependency updates.
Upgrade maven-scm-publish-plugin and update configuration for GitHub Pages deployment.
Comment out automatic push configurations in maven-gitflow-plugin to prevent accidental pushes.
Remove commented-out maven-site-plugin configuration and clean up reporting plugins.

.dockerignore.general_idea: The .github directory is removed from .dockerignore to allow CI configuration files to be included in the Docker build context.

.github/ci-settings.xml.general_idea: Changed the SonarQube host URL from a public university server to a local machine address.

.github/workflows/ci.yml.general_idea: Removed explicit JDK 8 setup step as the build now relies on a Docker container for the Java environment.
Removed Maven dependency caching step, likely due to switching to a self-contained Docker build or performance issues with self-hosted runners.
Changed the build command to use a shell script (`./mvn.sh`) which presumably invokes Maven inside a Docker container.
Added Microsoft Teams notifications for build success and failure using a specific GitHub Action.
.github/workflows/ci.yml.human_impl: Added `jdcargile/ms-teams-notification@v1.3` steps with `if: success()` and `if: failure()`.

.github/workflows/ci.yml.general_idea: Removed previous Microsoft Teams notification implementation that was being replaced.
Corrected the Maven site deployment command syntax in the CI workflow.
.github/workflows/ci.yml.human_impl: Changed `run: ./mvn.sh site:site site:deploy` to `run: ./mvn.sh site:site site-deploy`.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Maven build stage base image to a custom repository to ensure compatibility or availability.
Remove environment variables for Bintray credentials as the service is deprecated or no longer used.
Dockerfile.human_impl: Removed ARG BINTRAY_USERNAME, ENV BINTRAY_USERNAME, ARG BINTRAY_API_KEY, ENV BINTRAY_API_KEY

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the path to the Maven settings file to reflect a new directory structure for CI configuration.

build/build.sh.general_idea: Added comments to document required environment variables for the build script.
build/build.sh.human_impl: Added block comment listing GITHUBLOGIN, GITHUBPASSWORD, DOCKER_USERNAME, DOCKER_PASSWORD, SONAR_TOKEN

build/build.sh.general_idea: Added build argument to pass SonarQube token for code quality analysis during the build.

mvn.sh.general_idea: Replace short-form Docker CLI flags with their long-form equivalents for better readability and standard compliance.
Mount the local SSH directory into the container to enable secure Git operations or artifact retrieval.
Mount the local Git configuration into the container to preserve user-specific Git settings.
